name: Chocolate-Chip Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar, milk, and corn syrup in a heavy saucepan (3-quart).
2. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly, until the mixture reaches a boil.
3. Continue boiling without stirring until it reaches the soft-ball stage (234°F).
4. Remove from heat and let cool to lukewarm (110°F).
5. Add butter without stirring, then add vanilla and peanut butter; beat until the mixture begins to thicken and lose its gloss.
6. Quickly stir in the chocolate pieces and pour into a buttered 8x8x2-inch pan.
7. While warm, mark into squares.
8. Cool until firm before cutting as marked.
